title: Multiple attachments (Phase 4) - UI Improvements
summaryBody: We will impact users' ability to efficiently manage digital records by adding the functionality to attach multiple files to bank transactions, bills, and expenses.
detailBody: We will impact users' ability to efficiently manage digital records by adding the functionality to attach multiple files to bank transactions, bills, and expenses.
